kw.name: New Browser
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": true, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "/home/eusouanderson/treino/AutomaWeb/Celulares/\ud83e\uddea_Celulares/reports/2_20260305_120040/browser/traces/temp/ab012ae7-0968-4df1-9fb4-a5f9348530b8"}

kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://www.demoblaze.com/

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector css=.card-title >> nth=0 at state visible
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.

kw.name: Click
kw.msg:
Error: locator.click: Error: strict mode violation: locator('.card-title:nth-of-type(1)') resolved to 9 elements: 1)

…

aka getByRole('heading', { name: 'Samsung galaxy s6' }) 2)

…

…

kw.name: Get Title
kw.doc: Returns the title of the current page.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Go Back
kw.doc: Navigates to the previous page in history.
